aurora_background.instruction: Implement a background with 3-4 large colored blobs (violet, blue, emerald) using absolute positioning, 'filter: blur(120px)', and CSS keyframe animations to move them slowly. Overlay a noise texture if possible.

splash_cursor.instruction: Create a custom cursor component using Framer Motion or Canvas. It should leave a trailing 'splash' or 'glow' effect. If using 'react-bits', search for the specific implementation code. Otherwise, a simple 'spring' follow cursor with a trailing opacity decay works.

glassmorphism.rules: Use 'backdrop-blur-xl' heavily. Borders must be 1px and semi-transparent (white/10). Shadows should be colored glow rather than black shadows.

layout_strategies.landing: Hero with Aurora Background + Centered High-Impact Text. Features in a Bento Grid (Tetris Mode).
layout_strategies.dashboard: Sidebar navigation (Glass). Main content in a Masonry or High-Density Grid. Charts in glass containers.
layout_strategies.study_mode: Zen Mode. Center column max-w-3xl. Distraction-free. Text-heavy but with generous line-height.

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-600 to-blue-600 hover:from-violet-500 hover:to-blue-500 text-white shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(124,58,237,0.3)] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 text-white backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-full px-6 py-2 transition-all

components.cards: rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-slate-950/40 backdrop-blur-md shadow-xl
components.inputs: bg-slate-900/50 border-slate-800 focus:border-violet-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-violet-500 rounded-xl h-12 px-4

hero.description: Student focused on laptop in dark ambient room

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Run 'yarn add framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge lucide-react recharts' if not installed.
SETUP: In 'tailwind.config.js', ensure 'darkMode: class' is set. Add 'Space Grotesk' and 'Manrope' to font family config.
GLOBAL STYLES: In 'index.css', add the Google Fonts import. Set 'body' background to '#020617' and text to '#f8fafc'.
AURORA BG: Create 'components/ui/AuroraBackground.js'. Use 3 absolute div blobs with 'filter: blur(100px)' and 'animate-pulse' or custom keyframes to move them around. Colors: Violet, Blue, Emerald.

SPLASH CURSOR: Create 'components/ui/SplashCursor.js'. Use a simple useEffect to track 'mousemove' and render a fixed 'div' that follows the cursor with a spring animation (using framer-motion). Add a 'mix-blend-mode: screen' or 'overlay' for the glow effect.

GLASS CARD: Create a reusable '<GlassCard>' component that applies the glassmorphism utility classes defined in 'colors.glass.card'. Use this for ALL containers (Test questions, Dashboard widgets, Feature blocks).
CHARTS: Use 'recharts' for the Analytics dashboard. Style them with a custom 'Tooltip' that uses the GlassCard style.
ROUTING: Ensure 'react-router-dom' is set up for /login, /dashboard, /exam, /topics, /study/:topicId.
TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, inputs, and major containers.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for dark colors. Use solid dark colors with subtle borders.
Avoid 'transition: all'. Animate specific properties (opacity, transform, background-color).
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (APCA/WCAG AA).
